description: Babies Xmas Socks - First Christmas Delight Celebrate the magic of your baby's first Christmas with these adorable and cosy baby Xmas socks! Designed to keep your little ones warm and snuggly during the festive season, these socks are both charming and practical. Each pack contains four delightfully festive patterns: Santa Claus, Penguins, Elves, and Xmas Trees, all featuring heartwarming phrases. These playful designs will bring a smile to your face and add holiday cheer to your baby's outfit. Presented in a lovely festive gift bag, these Xmas socks make an ideal gift or stocking filler. They're a thoughtful and delightful holiday treat that will be cherished and remembered. With softness and comfort at the forefront, these baby socks are made from quality materials, including 70% Cotton, 23% Polyester, 5% Elastane, and 2% Metalised Fibres. This gentle combination ensures your baby's feet remain warm and comfortable throughout the season. Plus, keeping them clean and fresh is hassle-free, as they're machine washable! Available in two size options, 0-6 months and 6-12 months, these baby Xmas socks cater to the tiniest of feet. Make your baby's first Christmas a special and memorable one with these enchanting and cosy socks, designed to warm both their feet and your heart. Essential Product Details - Made from premium materials for warmth and comfort - Available in two size options: 0-6 and 6-12 months - Machine washable- Four charming festive patterns per pack - Comes in a festive gift bag ‚Äì perfect for gifting
